allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Refactor: Optimize codebase and unify typography

- Remove ~150 lines of duplicate CSS code across components
- Unify typography to ''Courier New'' monospace font for professional appearance
- Extract common styles (.container, .section, .section-title) to global styles.scss
- Remove unnecessary CommonModule imports from components
- Delete unused app.spec.ts test file
- Add SEO meta description to index.html
- Clean up font-family declarations across all components

This refactoring improves maintainability, consistency, and reduces bundle size.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''./package.json''\); console.log\(''@vercel/og:'', p.dependencies?.[''@vercel/og''] || p.devDependencies?.[''@vercel/og''] || ''NOT FOUND''\)")
